name: Disney® Visa® Card

earning_rates.notes: 1% back at Disney Store and select Disney purchases

other_benefits.name: Disney Character Photo
other_benefits.description: Complimentary Disney Character Photo at Disney Parks for cardmember

other_benefits.name: Shoprunner
other_benefits.description: Free 2-day shipping at hundreds of merchants with ShopRunner

notes: $0 AF version of Disney Visa. Lower earning rates than Premier (no 2% at Disney parks). Streaming credit is $60 vs $120 on Premier. Good intro card for Disney fans who don't want to pay an annual fee. The $0 AF and modest earning make it a supplementary card rather than a primary driver.
_no_credits_note: Chase Disney Visa ($0 AF, basic) — no recurring USD credits. Earning rates only (1% baseline + 1-2% Disney). 10% off at Disney parks/stores = % discount, not credit. Previous '$60 Streaming Credit' entry was unverified — Chase Disney basic does not have a streaming statement credit (Premier $49 has DashPass which is 1-yr promo). Removed 2026-04-27.
